title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Device disconnected
scenario: "Device has been disconnected" notification appears despite Notifications master toggle being OFF in Poly Lens Menu > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 2. Navigate to Menu → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF.
4. Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
5. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Lens app to the background.
6. Turn off the connected headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the headset powers down).
7. Observe whether a "Device has been disconnected" notification appears on the device.
expected: No "Device has been disconnected" notification should appear, because the Notifications master toggle is OFF.
